description: CT_SCANNER can only serve one patient at a time
Referral channel from ER_DOCTOR to CARDIOLOGIST initiates cardiac evaluation
Any medication prescription must be reviewed by PHARMACIST before administration
Findings must be explicitly shared between specialists (domain-specific visibility)
ER_DOCTOR determines whether cause is cardiac or pulmonary
Initial assessment by ER_DOCTOR precedes specialist referral
Prescription must pass PHARMACIST review before drug administration
ER_DOCTOR uses CT_SCANNER for imaging; only one patient can be scanned at a time
